description:
Executor the desktop workflow application for Windows. Speed up your daily workflow, opening things and doing things.

Executor the desktop workflow application for Windows. Speed up your daily workflow, opening things and doing things.

Key Features:
- Launch applications, files, folders, websites, web services (with parameters) and prompts in milliseconds.
- Trigger multiple actions with one text command and/or hotkey.
- Let's be an expert in opening up the world instead of trying to put the whole world inside of Executor (as some alternatives try to do).
- Take the clipboard to a new level, swiftly trigger system commands, do fast calculations, manage running applications and more.
- Tailor keywords, appearance, hotkeys, and behavior to perfectly match your daily workflow.
- Customize the look and feel with various skins and theming options to match your desktop setup.
Improvements
- Scanning additional index paths are now 50-100 times faster using simpler and faster API's.
- The additional index path dialog has the following changes:
- When pressing the "Test" button there's a continuously updated scanning count and also a "Stop" button.
- Test scanning is now done in a separate thread to not freeze up UI.
- Added a "Browse" button for setting the index path.
- Default index depth is 0 instead of 10.
- Optimized indexing of virtual shell items (like Start-Menu) to be faster.
- Added that in case Executor is large compared to the current screen it's displayed on (for example when sharing screen or switching screen), you can press Ctrl+F11 to center and autofit to a reasonable aspect of the screen. This is also available in the right-click menu (under "More..."). Also added Ctrl+Shift+F11 will do the same resizing no matter the size of Executor. Hint: The existing command $WEXECUTOR$ will also resize and position Executor.
- The ?saveclipboard keyword now saves images to .png format (previously .bmp). It's also possible to save as .jpg and .bmp. The default filename now also contains a timestamp.
- The online skin editor also had various improvements.
